privileged_info_summary: Hotel Artemide is a real 4-star boutique hotel located at Via Nazionale 22 in Rome, Italy. The task requires adding a LatestReview property to the Hotels class with embedded fields: stars (INTEGER), text (STRING), and date (DATE). These fields exactly match the Reviews class properties defined in the database schema. The test hotel (Hotel Artemide) exists in the seeded database and is verified as a real operational hotel. The required_fields metadata claim is accurate—the three fields (stars, text, date) are the exact properties defined for Reviews in seed_demodb.py.
